message.reasoning_content: We need extract structured fields from sentence: Alice is 30 years old and her email is alice@example.com. Reply with only JSON object — no markdown fences, no prose. We need produce JSON with likely fields: name, age, email. Need ensure only JSON object, no markdown fences. Use valid JSON format. Could be {"name":"Alice","age":30,"email":"alice@example.com"} No extra text.
